name: New Found Gold Corp.
description: New Found Gold Corp. is an emerging Canadian gold producer focused on the exploration and development of its mineral assets in Newfoundland and Labrador. The company holds a 100% interest in the flagship Queensway Gold Project, as well as the Hammerdown Gold Project and the Pine Cove Mill. With a commitment to responsible mining, the company leverages its strategic location near key infrastructure to advance its projects toward production. New Found Gold continues to yield significant exploration results, highlighting the district-scale potential of its prospective fault zones and its goal of becoming a key player in the Canadian gold sector.
